name: Interfor Corporation
description: Interfor Corporation is one of the world's largest lumber producers, with operations across North America. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company manufactures a wide range of wood products, including dimension lumber, timber, and specialty products like Western Red Cedar. Interfor operates sawmills in Canada and the United States, serving customers in North America, the Asia-Pacific region, and Europe with sustainable, high-quality forest products.
